description: `.paginate` call added at line 5 inside function `alpha` (line 4). The function signature has no cursor-discipline parameter (see §3.4 `DISCIPLINE_PARAMS` authoritative set) and its docstring carries no cardinality keyword (see §3.4 `DISCIPLINE_KEYWORDS` authoritative set). Code may time out under production cardinality.
fix: Either (a) add a cursor parameter to the function signature and seek from recent rather than genesis, (b) add a docstring naming the cardinality budget (e.g. `assumes ≤ 10k records; budget: 5s wall-time`), OR (c) document in the spec §2 Current State why unbounded iteration is deliberate.
title: Pagination marker added; enclosing function lacks cardinality discipline
